WARNING: These test points are for A2338 M2 (820-02773) ONLY. For other boards, use that board's diagnostic files.
title: 20V DCPS Triage — Board Powers But No Display / No Boot
description: Step-by-step diagnostic for A2338 M2 MacBook Pro 13" that draws power but fails to boot or show display. Uses 20V DCPS to bypass PD negotiation. Board has DFR (Touch Bar).
prerequisites: Board has already passed 5V triage (PPBUS_AON, PP3V8_AON, PP5V_S2 all present)

steps.name: Verify PPBUS_AON at 20V input
steps.action: Apply 20V via USB-C. Check PPBUS_AON at PBUS caps.
steps.expected: 12.6V (with battery) or rising voltage toward PPBUS regulation point

if_abnormal.too_high: Battery disconnected and charger not regulating — check SYS_DETECT
if_abnormal.too_low: Charger IC U5200 not switching properly
if_abnormal.current_draw_high: Short on PPBUS_AON — diode mode PBUS caps

steps.name: Check all S2 rails
steps.action: Measure S2-state rails that should be present after PMU startup.
steps.if_missing: Specific PMU buck/LDO has failed. Check that specific output for short.

steps.name: Check S1 retention rails
steps.action: Measure S1 rails. These should come up before SoC awake state.
steps.if_missing: SoC retention failure. Check specific rail for short, then check SoC U6000 BGA.

steps.name: Check AWAKE (DVFS) rails
steps.action: Measure SoC dynamic voltage rails. These only appear when PMU_ACTIVE_READY is asserted.

if_missing.none_present: PMU_ACTIVE_READY never asserted. Check PMU_RESET_L, SOC_FORCE_DFU signals (page 39-40).
if_missing.some_present: Specific DVFS buck failure. Check output for short. May be SoC BGA issue.

steps.name: Check NAND/SSD power
steps.action: If SoC appears to start but no boot: check NAND power rails.
steps.if_missing: NAND has no power. Check SPMU BUCK 6/12/13 outputs. If shorted, NAND IC may be dead.

steps.name: Check Display / DFR power
steps.action: If board boots (current draw pattern suggests boot) but no display.

if_missing.no_backlight: Check PPBUS_AONSW_LCD load switch enable. Check backlight boost IC.
if_missing.no_panel_power: Check display connector JP600 (page 78) for damage. Check PP5V_SM_LCD.
if_missing.no_dfr: Check DFR_PWR_EN enable signal. Check UT700/UT710 for damage.

steps.name: Check USB-C / Thunderbolt
steps.action: If board boots but USB-C ports not working.
steps.if_missing: ATC regulator failure. Check UF800/UF900/UF939 for damage.
